title: ALO — Cluster Usage
description: Request rates, latency percentiles, error tracking, and data volume analytics.

panels.title: Total Request Rate
panels.description: Total request count over time across the selected filters.

targets.query: cluster_name:(${cluster:lucene}) AND identity.applicative_provider:(${application:lucene}) AND request.target:(${target:lucene}) AND request.operation:(${operation:lucene}) AND identity.username:(${username:lucene}) AND stress.cost_indicator_names:(${cost_indicator:lucene}) AND identity.client_host:(${client_host:lucene}) AND request.template:(${template:lucene})

panels.title: Rate by Operation
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by operation. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.query: cluster_name:(${cluster:lucene}) AND identity.applicative_provider:(${application:lucene}) AND request.target:(${target:lucene}) AND request.operation:(${operation:lucene}) AND identity.username:(${username:lucene}) AND stress.cost_indicator_names:(${cost_indicator:lucene}) AND identity.client_host:(${client_host:lucene}) AND request.template:(${template:lucene})

panels.title: ES Latency
panels.description: Elasticsearch response-time trend with Avg / P50 / P95 / P99. Rising P95/P99 signals tail-latency issues.

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Count of error responses (status ≥ 400) vs total requests.

targets.query: cluster_name:(${cluster:lucene}) AND identity.applicative_provider:(${application:lucene}) AND request.target:(${target:lucene}) AND request.operation:(${operation:lucene}) AND identity.username:(${username:lucene}) AND stress.cost_indicator_names:(${cost_indicator:lucene}) AND identity.client_host:(${client_host:lucene}) AND request.template:(${template:lucene}) AND response.status:[400 TO *]
